overall.description: Third-person game engine footage of a female character exploring the Trocadéro gardens in Paris. The character descends from upper terraces, walks through tree-lined gardens and around dry fountain basins, passes the Palais de Chaillot, and approaches the Eiffel Tower on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace of Trocadéro with broad stone stairs

events.description: character begins descending wide stone staircase toward lower gardens

agents.ego_description: walking down stone stairs from upper terrace, with the Eiffel Tower visible ahead in the distance

entered.detail: wide stone terrace with beige paved surface and low walls
broad ceremonial staircase descending to lower garden level
iron lattice tower rising above the tree line
classical stone building with columns visible behind the character

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the upper terrace of the Trocadéro with the character standing on stone paving. The Eiffel Tower is visible in the distance as the character begins descending a wide staircase. The Palais de Chaillot building looms behind while garden trees fill the mid-ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined garden path with dirt and dry grass

agents.ego_description: walking along unpaved dirt path through garden area with mature trees on both sides

entered.detail: mature deciduous trees with dense green summer foliage
unpaved trail with patches of dry grass and dirt

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a shaded garden area with dirt paths and dense green trees. The Eiffel Tower remains visible ahead through the foliage, growing slightly larger as the character advances. The stone architecture of the upper terrace is left behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: dry fountain basins and open plaza approaching classical building

events.description: emerging from tree cover into open plaza with geometric dry fountain basins

agents.ego_description: navigating around dry concrete fountain basins and walking toward the Palais de Chaillot

entered.detail: large concrete fountain basin with geometric patterns, partially filled with low water
grand classical building with tall columns and curved stone facade

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the trees into a wide open plaza featuring large dry fountain basins with geometric concrete patterns. The Palais de Chaillot classical building becomes prominent on the left while the Eiffel Tower shifts to the right side of the frame as the character approaches the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza in front of Palais de Chaillot classical facade

agents.ego_description: walking along the front of the classical stone building, passing stone ramps and stairways

entered.detail: sloped stone ramp leading up to building entrance
detailed classical facade with tall windows, columns, and sculptural stonework

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the imposing frontage of the Palais de Chaillot, with its classical stone columns and detailed facade dominating the left side. The plaza pavement is wide and open, with stone ramps visible to the right. The Eiffel Tower remains visible to the right rear as the character moves parallel to the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: central walkway between dry fountains leading to Eiffel Tower

events.description: character turns away from building and begins walking directly toward the Eiffel Tower
character stops walking and stands still to observe the tower

agents.ego_description: walking along the central axis toward the Eiffel Tower, then stopping to stand and look around the plaza

entered.detail: long rectangular reflecting pool basin running parallel to the walkway
wide open paved plaza with geometric tile patterns

segments.scene_description: The character turns to face the Eiffel Tower and walks along the central axis of the Trocadéro plaza, passing between long dry fountain basins. The Palais de Chaillot is left behind as the tower grows larger in the frame. The character continues walking until stopping near the end of the segment to stand and observe the iconic iron structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the elevated terraces of the Trocadéro down through shaded gardens and across a wide plaza toward the Eiffel Tower. It begins on stone paving with the tower visible in the distance as the character descends a wide staircase, leaving the Palais de Chaillot behind. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a shaded garden of dirt paths and dense green foliage that partially obscures the tower before opening up into a wide plaza featuring geometric dry fountain basins. The camera then tracks along the imposing classical columns and stone facade of the Palais de Chaillot, moving parallel to the building across the open pavement. Finally, the character turns away from the architecture to walk along the central axis of the plaza, passing between the long basins as the Eiffel Tower grows larger in the frame until the character stops to observe the iconic structure.
